tagline: Processes and underwrites the loan to a clear-to-close — a DE underwriter signs the decision.
problem: It costs ~$9,000 to originate a loan — mostly processor and underwriter labor against codified guidelines — and any model-driven decision invites fair-lending scrutiny.
outcome: Documents are classified, income/assets verified, and eligibility decided against agency guidelines straight-through; the DE underwriter signs the approval and clear-to-close.

steps.does: Intake the application (1003) and borrower documents
Verify income/assets, pull credit, and run automated underwriting (DU / LPA)
Apply investor overlays and the ECOA / fair-lending + TRID checks
A DE-authorized underwriter signs the approval and clear-to-close
Issue the approval and clear the loan to close
Monitor conditions, early-payment-default and HMDA reporting
